# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for GCE firewall rules. Create rules that allow SSH (port 22), RDP (port 3389), HTTP (port 80), and HTTPS (port 443) from any source IP (0.0.0.0/0). Our development team needs global access to test instances.
# Category: cloud_network_security

resources:
- name: allow-ssh
  type: Compute.V1.Firewall
  properties:
    network: ${self ссылка.network}
    allowed:
    - IPProtocol: TCP
      ports: [22]
    sourceRanges: ['0.0.0.0/0']
- name: allow-rdp
  type: Compute.V1.Firewall
  properties:
    network: ${self ссылка.network}
    allowed:
    - IPProtocol: TCP
      ports: [3389]
    sourceRanges: ['0.0.0.0/0']
- name: allow-http
  type: Compute.V1.Firewall
  properties:
    network: ${self ссылка.network}
    allowed:
    - IPProtocol: TCP
      ports: [80]
    sourceRanges: ['0.0.0.0/0']
- name: allow-https
  type: Compute.V1.Firewall
  properties:
    network: ${self ссылка.network}
    allowed:
    - IPProtocol: TCP
      ports: [443]
    sourceRanges: ['0.0.0.0/0']
